description_long: This bungalow features a modern, cubic design with a flat, tiered roof and a prominent use of white and black exterior materials. Large, grid-patterned windows dominate the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The structure is surrounded by a low, wide platform bordered by a blue accent strip, possibly representing a shallow water feature or decorative trim. The base of the building is rendered in a brown, earth-like material, suggesting a raised foundation. The entryway is centrally located and recessed, flanked by the largest window panels. The overall appearance is sleek and geometric, with clean lines and a minimalist approach.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large grid windows, white and black exterior, and a wide platform base accented in blue.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, two large grid windows, and the wide platform with blue trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlights a single large window and the depth of the platform, with minimal entry detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays three large grid windows and the continuous blue-accented platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, with a single large window and visible platform edge.
